2604.18320.title: EVE: Verifiable Self-Evolution of MLLMs via Executable Visual Transformations
2604.18320.paper_summary: Self-evolution of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remains a critical challenge: pseudo-label-based methods suffer from progressive quality degradation as model predictions drift, while template-based methods are confined to a static set of transformations that cannot adapt in difficulty or diversity. We contend that robust, continuous self-improvement requires not only deterministic external feedback independent of the model's internal certainty, but also a mechanism to perpetually diversify the training distribution. To this end, we introduce EVE (Executable Visual transformation-based self-Evolution), a novel framework that entirely bypasses pseudo-labels by harnessing executable visual transformations continuously enriched in both variety and complexity. EVE adopts a Challenger-Solver dual-policy architecture. The Challenger maintains and progressively expands a queue of visual transformation code examples, from which it synthesizes novel Python scripts to perform dynamic visual transformations. Executing these scripts yields VQA problems with absolute, execution-verified ground-truth answers, eliminating any reliance on model-generated supervision. A multi-dimensional reward system integrating semantic diversity and dynamic difficulty calibration steers the Challenger to enrich its code example queue while posing progressively more challenging tasks, preventing mode collapse and fostering reciprocal co-evolution between the two policies. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EVE consistently surpasses existing self-evolution methods, establishing a robust and scalable paradigm for verifiable MLLM self-evolution. The code is available at https://github.com/0001Henry/EVE .
2604.18320.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）的自我演化仍然是一個關鍵挑戰：基於偽標籤的方法隨著模型預測的漂移而遭受逐漸的質量下降，而基於模板的方法則受到靜態轉換集的限制，無法在難度或多樣性上進行調整。我們認為，穩健的持續自我改進不僅需要獨立於模型內部確定性的確定性外部反饋，還需要一種機制來不斷多樣化訓練分佈。為此，我們引入了EVE（可執行視覺轉換基礎的自我演化），這是一個全新框架，完全繞過了偽標籤，通過利用不斷增強多樣性和複雜性的可執行視覺轉換來實現。EVE採用挑戰者-解決者雙政策架構。挑戰者維護並逐步擴展一個視覺轉換代碼示例的隊列，從中合成新的Python腳本以執行動態視覺轉換。執行這些腳本會產生具有絕對、執行驗證的真實答案的VQA問題，消除了對模型生成的監督的任何依賴。一個多維獎勵系統整合了語義多樣性和動態難度校準，指導挑戰者豐富其代碼示例隊列，同時提出逐漸更具挑戰性的任務，防止模式崩潰並促進兩種政策之間的相互共同演化。大量實驗表明，EVE始終超越現有的自我演化方法，建立了一個穩健且可擴展的可驗證MLLM自我演化範式。代碼可在https://github.com/0001Henry/EVE 獲得。
2604.18320.author: Yongrui Heng et.al.
2604.18320.authors: Yongrui Heng, Chaoya Jiang, Han Yang, Shikun Zhang, Wei Ye
